ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "number_vaccinated" REAL /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for vaccination numbers */,
  "percent_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of population vaccinated */,
  "percent_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for vaccination percentage */,
  "measure_universe" REAL /* Measure universe (e.g., population aged 18+) */,
  "total_population" REAL /* Total population of the geographic region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "population" REAL /* Population of the geographic region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic region */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic region (e.g., State, County, City) */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the geographic region */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent geographic region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "week_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., April 14-26, 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the time period */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year */,
  "is_current_week" INTEGER /* Indicates if the week is the current week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is a default category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_numbers" (
  "number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination number */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "number_vaccinated" REAL /* Number of people vaccinated in the category */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the vaccinated population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the vaccinated population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_numbers_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "margins_of_error" (
  "margin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each margin of error */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the vaccination number in the category */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("margin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_margins_of_error_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentages" (
  "percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "percentage_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of population vaccinated in the category */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentages_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentage_margins_of_error" (
  "margin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each margin of error */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the vaccination percentage in the category */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("margin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_margins_of_error_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_universes" (
  "universe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure universe */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "measure_universe" REAL /* Measure universe for the vaccination data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("universe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measure_universes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total population */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "total_population" REAL /* Total population of the geographic region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_populations_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacination_data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is a default category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacination_data_categories_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_region_vaccination_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "number_vaccinated" REAL /* Number of people vaccinated in the geographic region */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the vaccination number in the geographic region */,
  "percent_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of population vaccinated in the geographic region */,
  "percent_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the vaccination percentage in the geographic region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_region_vaccination_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_region_vaccination_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_region_vaccination_numbers" (
  "number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination number */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "number_vaccinated" REAL /* Number of people vaccinated in the category and geographic region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the vaccinated population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the vaccinated population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_region_vaccination_numbers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_region_vaccination_data ("region_id")
)
